SEARCH
Package com.apigee.openapi.converter

Class ApigeeApiConfig.Builder

java.lang.Object
com.apigee.openapi.converter.ApigeeApiConfig.Builder
Enclosing class:
ApigeeApiConfig
public static class ApigeeApiConfig.Builder extends Object
Builder for ApigeeApiConfig.

  • Method Details

    • organization

      public ApigeeApiConfig.Builder organization(String organization)
      Sets the Apigee organization name. This is required.
      Parameters:
      organization - The organization name (e.g., "my-gcp-project" for Apigee X)
      Returns:
      this builder

    • proxyHostname

      public ApigeeApiConfig.Builder proxyHostname(String proxyHostname)
      Sets the Apigee proxy hostname for the generated OpenAPI spec. This is the hostname where your Apigee gateway is accessible (e.g., "10.43.65.12.nip.io" or "api.mycompany.com"). The server URL in the generated spec will be: https://{proxyHostname}{basePath}
      Parameters:
      proxyHostname - The Apigee proxy gateway hostname
      Returns:
      this builder

    • baseUrl

      public ApigeeApiConfig.Builder baseUrl(String baseUrl)
      Sets a custom base URL for the Apigee Management API. Defaults to "https://apigee.googleapis.com/v1" for Apigee X/hybrid.
      Parameters:
      baseUrl - The base URL
      Returns:
      this builder

    • serviceAccountKeyPath

      public ApigeeApiConfig.Builder serviceAccountKeyPath(Path keyPath) throws IOException
      Sets credentials from a service account JSON key file path.
      Parameters:
      keyPath - Path to the service account JSON key file
      Returns:
      this builder
      Throws:
      IOException - if the file cannot be read

    • serviceAccountKeyPath

      public ApigeeApiConfig.Builder serviceAccountKeyPath(String keyPath) throws IOException
      Sets credentials from a service account JSON key file path string.
      Parameters:
      keyPath - Path to the service account JSON key file
      Returns:
      this builder
      Throws:
      IOException - if the file cannot be read

    • serviceAccountKeyJson

      public ApigeeApiConfig.Builder serviceAccountKeyJson(String jsonKey) throws IOException
      Sets credentials from a service account JSON key string.
      Parameters:
      jsonKey - The JSON key content as a string
      Returns:
      this builder
      Throws:
      IOException - if parsing fails

    • serviceAccountKeyStream

      public ApigeeApiConfig.Builder serviceAccountKeyStream(InputStream jsonStream) throws IOException
      Sets credentials from an InputStream containing service account JSON.
      Parameters:
      jsonStream - InputStream containing the JSON key
      Returns:
      this builder
      Throws:
      IOException - if parsing fails

    • credentials

      public ApigeeApiConfig.Builder credentials(com.google.auth.oauth2.GoogleCredentials credentials)
      Sets pre-created GoogleCredentials. Use this for advanced scenarios like Application Default Credentials.
      Parameters:
      credentials - The GoogleCredentials instance
      Returns:
      this builder

    • useApplicationDefaultCredentials

      public ApigeeApiConfig.Builder useApplicationDefaultCredentials() throws IOException
      Uses Application Default Credentials. This looks for credentials in standard locations: - GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS environment variable - Cloud SDK credentials - Compute Engine/GKE metadata service
      Returns:
      this builder
      Throws:
      IOException - if credentials cannot be found

    • build

      public ApigeeApiConfig build()
      Builds the ApigeeApiConfig instance.
      Returns:
      The configured ApigeeApiConfig
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if required fields are missing
